name: Meat and Potato Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Shape into a 7-inch meatball.
3. Place a trivet in the pot.
4. Place the meatball on a double thickness of cheesecloth (about 24 inches square).
5. Hold the ends of the cheesecloth and gently lower the meat into the pot.
6. Loosely fold the cloth over the top of the meat.
7. Cover; cook on LOW for 6-7 hours.
8. Holding the ends of the cloth, lift the meat from the pot.
9. Cut into wedges. Makes 6 or 7 wedges.
